title: Add setting option to "Write updates via email" to capture entire email chain as update. Not just the reply message.
excerpt: We bcc the special item email update email link when replying to clients to capture correspondence related to the specific item. When replyig to emails you need to capture previous email chain conversations logged with t…

posts.author: JoeC (Joe)
posts.cookedHtml:
We bcc the special item email update email link when replying to clients to capture correspondence related to the specific item. When replyig to emails you need to capture previous email chain conversations logged with the update. Currently Monday will not capture the entire email conversation, just the reply message. Losing the ability to see the entire chain of conversation.

It would be a great feature to enable or disable capturing the entire content of an email chain when using “Write updates via email”.
